---
title: "Main Functions"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(Plarrr)
plastics <- load_data()
```

## summarize_country()

```{r}
summarize_country(plastics, "India")
```

## summary_category_metrics()

```{r}
summary_category_metrics(plastics)
```

## plot_plastics()

```{r}
plot_plastics(plastics, country = "India")
```

## plot_plastic_ridges()

```{r}
plot_plastic_ridges(plastics)
```
